DISCOVERY 302, MTN FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. MIDLAND'S REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $90.00 IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. MIDLAND SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN 1 WEEK THAT COMPLIES WITH CAL. R. CT. 3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Establishing Admission
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions is GRANTED as unopposed. Midland's request for monetary sanctions in the amount of $90.00 is GRANTED as unopposed. Midland shall submit a proposed order within 1 week that complies with Cal. R. Ct. 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
